network_summary: Dr. Linh Thuy Tran, DMD/DDS is the documented owner-dentist of three TranDai Dental Care locations across Chicagoland (Des Plaines ZIP 60018, Chicago Edgewater ZIP 60640, Chicago West Rogers Park ZIP 60659). Each location operates under a different DBA (Oakton White Dental, Broadway Dental Associates, Peterson FOREVER SMILES). NPPES explicitly records her title as 'DENTIST / OWNER' at the Peterson Ave location. No MSO, management company, DSO platform, or PE sponsor was found. This is a private multi-office dental group owned and operated by a single dentist.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Linh Thuy Tran, DMD/DDS — dentist and documented owner (NPPES title 'DENTIST / OWNER' on NPI 1275204208)

NPI 1902063043 (Chicago 60640): AO = DR. LINH THUY TRAN, title DENTIST, DBA = Broadway Dental Associates
NPI 1275204208 (Chicago 60659): AO = Mrs. Linh Thuy Tran, title DENTIST / OWNER, DBA = Peterson FOREVER SMILES
Shared authorized official (LINH THUY TRAN) across all three NPIs, confirmed by opennpi.com
All three organizations share the legal/trade name TRANDAI DENTAL CARE
evidence_chain: AO signal: LINH TRAN appears as authorized official on 3 org NPIs across ZIPs 60018, 60640, 60659, all under the TRANDAI DENTAL CARE brand. Documentary corroboration: opennpi.com confirms AO = DR. LINH THUY TRAN (NPI 1902063043, 5449 N Broadway); opennpi.com confirms AO = Mrs. Linh Thuy Tran with title 'DENTIST / OWNER' (NPI 1275204208, 3044 W Peterson); opennpi.com confirms AO = DR. LINH THUY TRAN (NPI 1659542330, 1625 E Oakton). Healthgrades independently lists Dr. Linh Tran DMD practicing at the Des Plaines TranDai location. No MSO/DSO/PE layer found after searching 'Linh Tran TranDai Dental owner Chicago multiple locations'. Verdict: dentist-owned private multi-location group.
future_app_notes: Three distinct consumer-facing DBAs (Oakton White Dental, Broadway Dental Associates, Peterson FOREVER SMILES) make this network appear as three independent practices on Google Maps and Yelp — a stealth-like presentation without any corporate/MSO layer. If the network grows to 4+ locations or a management company is registered, re-evaluate as branded_dso. The NPI at 5449 N Broadway also co-locates with Broadway Medical Office SC (OB/GYN, NPI 1427271790) and an Internal Medicine physician, suggesting a multi-specialty medical building — the dental NPI is distinct. Dr. Anhminh Trandai (possibly a relative) also practices at the Broadway and Des Plaines locations but has separate individual NPIs.
